nodes.title: Login Page
nodes.description: pages/login: Calls auth.login(username, password). Redirects to /businesses on success.

nodes.title: Business Select
nodes.description: pages/business-select: Calls api.getBusinesses(). Displays business cards. Navigates to /biz/:bizId.

nodes.title: Dashboard
nodes.description: pages/dashboard: Loads stations, employees, accounts, funds, suppliers, pendingAccounts, business, warehouses.

nodes.title: Accounts
nodes.description: pages/accounts: CRUD accounts with tree view. Calls getAccounts, createAccount, updateAccount, deleteAccount.

nodes.title: Funds
nodes.description: pages/funds: CRUD funds + fund types. Calls getFunds, getFundTypes, getStations, create/update/delete.

nodes.title: Vouchers
nodes.description: pages/vouchers: Enhanced list, create, draft, update, status change. Calls getVouchersEnhanced, getOperationTypes, getAccounts, getFunds, getAccountBalance, createVoucher, createVoucherDraft, updateVoucher, changeVoucherStatus.

nodes.title: Journal
nodes.description: pages/journal: CRUD journal entries. Calls getJournalEntries, getAccounts, getOperationTypes, createJournalEntry, deleteJournalEntry.

nodes.title: Operation Types
nodes.description: pages/operation-types: CRUD + clone. Calls getOperationTypes, getAllAccounts, getFunds, getWarehouses, create/update/delete/cloneOperationType.

nodes.title: Custom Screens
nodes.description: pages/custom-screens: Complex screen with widgets. Calls getScreens, getCollectionStyleConfig, getWidgetLogEnhanced, getWidgetStatsEnhanced, getWidgetChartEnhanced, getWidgetAccounts, getWarehouseInventory, createVoucher, saveCollectionStyleConfig.

nodes.title: Sidebar Settings
nodes.description: pages/sidebar-settings: Manage sidebar sections/items/user config. Calls getUsers, getSidebarSections, getSidebarItems, getUserSidebar, updateUserSidebar, create/update/deleteSidebarSection, createSidebarItem, updateSidebarItem.

nodes.title: Reports (Basic)
nodes.description: pages/reports: Basic reports view. Calls getAccounts, getFunds, getEmployees, getVouchers, getJournalEntries.

nodes.title: Reports (Advanced)
nodes.description: pages/reports-advanced: Advanced reports. Calls getAccounts, getProfitLossReport, getAccountStatement, getDailySummary, getTrialBalance.

nodes.title: Banks
nodes.description: pages/banks: CRUD bank accounts + bank types. Calls getAccounts, getBankTypes, create/update/delete.

nodes.title: Exchanges
nodes.description: pages/exchanges: CRUD exchange accounts + exchange types. Calls getAccounts, getExchangeTypes, create/update/delete.

nodes.title: Wallets
nodes.description: pages/wallets: CRUD wallet accounts + e-wallet types. Calls getAccounts, getEWalletTypes, create/update/delete.

nodes.title: Partners
nodes.description: pages/partners: CRUD partners. Calls getBusiness, getPartners, create/update/deletePartner.

nodes.title: Warehouse
nodes.description: pages/warehouse: CRUD warehouses + warehouse types. Calls getWarehouses, getStations, getWarehouseTypes, create/update/delete.

nodes.title: Warehouse Operations
nodes.description: pages/warehouse-operations: Create and view operations. Calls getWarehouseOperations, getWarehouses, getSuppliers, getOperationTypes, createWarehouseOperation, getWarehouseOperation.

nodes.title: Suppliers
nodes.description: pages/suppliers: CRUD suppliers. Calls getSuppliers, create/update/deleteSupplier.

nodes.title: Settlements
nodes.description: pages/settlements: CRUD settlements. Calls getSettlements, getAccounts, getFunds, getStations, create/update/deleteSettlement.

nodes.title: Pending Accounts
nodes.description: pages/pending-accounts: CRUD pending accounts. Calls getPendingAccounts, create/update/deletePendingAccount.

nodes.title: Exchange Rates
nodes.description: pages/exchange-rates: CRUD exchange rates + convert. Calls getCurrencies, getExchangeRates, create/update/deleteExchangeRate, convertCurrency.

nodes.title: Roles
nodes.description: pages/roles: CRUD roles + user assignment. Calls getRoles, getUsers, getUserRoles, create/update/deleteRole, assignUserRole, removeUserRole.

nodes.title: Collections
nodes.description: pages/collections: Create vouchers from collections. Calls getOperationTypes, getAccounts, getFunds, getVouchers, createVoucher.

nodes.title: Billing Systems
nodes.description: pages/billing-systems: CRUD billing accounts, config, types. Calls getEmployeeBillingAccounts, getBillingSystemsConfig, getBillingAccountTypes, getStations, getEmployees, create/update/delete.

nodes.title: Journal Categories
nodes.description: pages/journal-categories: CRUD categories. Calls getJournalEntryCategories, create/update/deleteJournalEntryCategory.

nodes.title: Stations
nodes.description: pages/stations: View stations. Calls getStations.

nodes.title: Employees
nodes.description: pages/employees: CRUD employees. Calls getEmployees, create/update/deleteEmployee.

nodes.title: Summary
nodes.description: pages/summary: Business summary. Calls getBusinesses.
